entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop studied for the inheritance of grain iron and zinc densities.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential minerals, specifically iron and zinc, targeted for biofortification in crops.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of food crops through genetic improvement.

entities.name: MATERNAL EFFECT
entities.description: The influence of the female parent's genotype or cytoplasm on the offspring's phenotype.

entities.name: GRAIN IRON DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of iron measured in the grains of pearl millet.

entities.name: GRAIN ZINC DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of zinc measured in the grains of pearl millet.

entities.name: RECIPROCAL CROSSING
entities.description: A breeding technique involving direct and reciprocal crosses to identify maternal inheritance.

entities.name: MATERNAL GENES
entities.description: Genes located in the cytoplasm or inherited exclusively from the maternal parent.

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding program designed to produce hybrid offspring with desired traits.
